info.description:
Manage communication between Catalog and VTEX

 **Last update**: 11 feb 26, 07:03 a. m.
info.title: VtexCatalog Service

tags.name: Webhook
tags.description: History of Webhooks received from VTEX

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
This section documents the webhook events triggered by products and skus.

To learn more about Webhooks configuration, see the [Webhooks Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/webhook)

put.summary: Update Attributes. Restricted to particular properties.
put.description:
Updates particular Attribute's properties and triggers the process to publish it in **VTEX**. Also, It tries to publish **Attribute Field Values** for the **Attribute**.

**Disclaimer**:
  - Only the properties **isFilter**, **isOnProductDetails**, **isTopMenuLinkActive**, **isSideMenuLinkActive** can be modified.
  - Only valid for already published **Attribute**.

200.description: The Attributes begins the process to be published

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **Attributes** in **VTEX**. Also, It tries to publish **Attribute Field Values** for the **Attribute**.

**Disclaimer**:
  - **Attributes Groups** must be published.
  - If **Attribute** has `category`, **Category** must be published.

200.description: The Attributes begins the process to be published

post.description:
Create or update massive attribute items. The maximum of attributes admitted is `10000`.

Updates particular Attribute's properties and, if the account setting is enabled, it triggers the process to publish them in **VTEX**.

**Disclaimer**:
  - Only the properties **isFilter**, **isOnProductDetails**, **isTopMenuLinkActive**, **isSideMenuLinkActive** can be modified.
  - Only valid for already published **Attributes**.

get.summary: Get an Attribute Group by ID
Get a list of Attribute Groups

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **Attribute Groups** in **VTEX**.

**Disclaimer**: Every Group will be publish with `categoryId: null`

200.description: The Attribute Groups begins the process to be published

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

post.description: Begins the process to publish **Brands** in **VTEX**.

200.description: The Brands begins the process to be published

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

post.description: Begins the process to publish **Categories** in **VTEX**.

200.description: The Categories begins the process to be published

post.summary: Vtex Commerce Account saved event listener
post.description: Vtex Commerce Account saved event listener

post.summary: VTEX Commerce Sales Channel saved event listener
post.description: VTEX Commerce Sales Channel saved event listener

200.description: The Products begins the process to be published

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **Products** in **VTEX**.

Also it try to add the **Sales-Channels** for each **Product**.

**Disclaimer**: Needs **Brands** and **Categories** to be published first.

200.description: The Products begins the process to be published

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **Products Attributes** in **VTEX**.

**Disclaimer**:
  - **Products** must be published.
  - **Attributes** must be published.

200.description: The Products Attributes begins the process to be published
The Products begins the process to be published

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **SKUs** in **VTEX**.

Also it try to publish the **EANs** for each **SKU**.

**Disclaimer**:
  - Needs **Products** to be published first.
  - **SKUs** new or without **Images** with *Status Active* will be published with `IsActive: false` until **Images** are added.

200.description: The SKUs begins the process to be published

post.description:
Begins the process to publish **Images** for the given **SKUs** in **VTEX**.

Also, It updates the current **SKU** `images` field data.

**Disclaimer**: Needs **SKUs** to be published first.

requestBody.description: The new, modified or deleted **Images** for **SKUs** to be published

200.description: The SKUs Images begins the process to be published

get.summary: Get VTEX attribute for the Attribute
Get VTEX attribute group for the current Attribute Group
Get VTEX brand for the Brand
Get VTEX category for the Category
Get VTEX product for the Product
Get VTEX sku for the Sku

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

commerceId.description: The ID used by the external platform related to this record (e.g, VTEX, Magento).

catalogId.description: The unique identifier of the item in [Catalog](/v2/service/catalog) Service

pendingPublishStatus.description: The Sku Pending status. It will be `pendingPublish` if there is a publish process running, otherwise it will be `stoppedPublish`

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

notifiedDateRange.description: The day of notification to S3 by date range

message.example: Importation ok but some changes are required
Ok but some changes are required

fieldGroupID.description: The Attribute's Group ID in VTEX

fieldTypeId.description:
The Attribute's Type ID in VTEX

- text: 1
- bigger-text or multi-line-text: 2
- number: 4
- combo: 5
- radio: 6
- checkbox: 7
- indexed-text: 8
- indexed-bigger-text or indexed-multi-line-text: 9

categoryId.description: Attribute's Group's Category VTEX ID. Can be `null`

isFilter.description: True to allow the attribute to be used as a facet (filter) on the VTEX search navigation bar.

isSideMenuLinkActive.description: True to make the attribute field clickable in the VTEX search navigation bar.

isTopMenuLinkActive.description: True to make the attribute visible in the VTEX store's upper menu.

isOnProductDetails.description: True to set the attribute as visible on the VTEX product page.

isStockKeepingUnit.description: If Attribute is applies to SKU

defaultValue.description: The Attribute's default value. Admits `string` and `number`

isActive.description: If Attribute Value is Active. If it is `false`, this Attribute Value does not exist in Janis

AttributePublish.description: A Attribute to be published in VTEX

options.description: The list of Attributes options, the Attribute Value in VTEX

AttributesPublishList.description: A list of Attributes to be published

categoryId.description: Attribute's Group's Category VTEX ID. Can be `null`

position.description: Attribute's Group's position respect the other groups. Can be `null`.

AttributeGroupPublish.description: A Brand to be published in VTEX

AttributeGroupsPublishList.description: A list of Attribute's Group to be published

BrandPublish.description: A Brand to be published in VTEX

BrandsPublishList.description: A list of Brands to be published

BrandPendingPublishList.description: A list of Brands Pending to be published

description.example: Every Coffee grain or product related

parentCatalogId.description: The Parent Category's Id in Catalog Service

importError.description: If Category has an error in last import

CategoryPublish.description: A Category to be published in VTEX

CategoriesPublishList.description: A list of Categories to be published

CategoryPendingPublishList.description: A list of Categories Pending to be published

description.example: A full description of the product

descriptionShort.example: A short description of the product

showWithoutStock.description: Indicates if product is shown without stock

attributes.description: The Attribute's option values assigned to the Product

attributeStatus.description: The Product Attributes Value's import status.

ProductPublish.description: A Product to be published in VTEX

salesChannelsToAdd.description: List of [Commerce Sales-Channels](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channels)'s ID to be added.

salesChannelsToRemove.description: List of [Commerce Sales-Channels](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channels)'s ID to be removed

ProductsPublishList.description: A list of Products to be published

publishStatus.description: The Product Attribute Value's publish status

importStatus.description: The Product Attribute Value's import status

ProductAttributesPublish.description: A Product Attributes to be published in VTEX

attributes.description:
The **Attributes** assigned to a **Product**.

- `Property name *` : The [Attribute ID](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) in Catalog Service
- values: the possible options for an **Attribute**. Must respect the `fieldType`.

ProductsAttributesPublishList.description: A list of Products Attributes to be published

ProductPendingPublishList.description: A list of Products Pending to be published

RetryPublishErrorsPayload.description: Payload to retry to publish all error records

account.description: The [Vtex-Commerce Account](/v2/service/vtex-commerce#tag/Account) ID for which to retry publishing items

productClusterIds.description: The sku's products cluster ids concatenated with commas

productIsVisible.description: Is true if the sku's product is visible

eansToPublish.description: The sku's eans after publish, it is a temporary field

stockKeepingUnitId.description: The seller's stock keepint unit's id

sellerStockKeepingUnitId.description: The seller's seller stock keeping unit's id

isActive.description: Is true if the seller is active

publishErrorMessage.description: A message if an error when the image is being published

isGiftCardRecharge.description: Is true if the sku is a gift card recharge

isInventoried.description: Is true if the sku is inventoried

isTransported.description: Is true if the sku is transported

showIfNotAvailable.description: Is true if sku is shown if available

isActive.description: Is true if the attachments is active

isRequired.description: Is true if the attachments is required

id.description: The attribute's Vtex id. This refer to the `vtexId` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/vtex-catalog#tag/Attribute).

name.description: The attribute's name. This refer to the `name` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/vtex-catalog#tag/Attribute).

values.description: The SKU Attribute's value value. This refer to the `values` of the **Sku-Attribute** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/SkuAttribute).

valueFieldId.description: The SKU attribute's value field Vtex Id. This refer to the `valueFieldId` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/vtex-catalog#tag/Attribute).

publishStatus.description: The status of publish SKU Attribute in Vtex

publishMessage.description: A message of the result of publish SKU Attribute in VTEX, if it's empty no message is sent as response. Errors messages are the main use.

SkuPublish.description: A Sku to be published in VTEX

SkusPublishList.description: A list of SKUs to be published

SkuImageBase.description: A Sku to be published in **VTEX**

id.description: This refers to the `id` of a **SKU-Image** in **Janis Catalog** Service. See [SKU-Image](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku-Image)

title.description: This refers to the `title` of a **SKU-Image** in **Janis Catalog** Service. See [SKU-Image](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku-Image)

sku.description: This refers to the `id` of a **SKU** in **Janis Catalog** Service. See [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku)

accounts.description: A list of `id` of a **Account** in **Janis Vtex-Commerce** Service. See [Account](/v2/service/vtex-commerce#tag/Account)

url.description: This refers to the *public URL* of a **SKU-Image** in **Janis Catalog** Service. See [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku-Image)

isNew.description: Indicates if the Image must be created in **VTEX**

isModified.description: Indicates if the Image must be updated in **VTEX**

isDeleted.description: Indicates if the Image must be deleted in **VTEX**

SkusImagesPublishList.description: A list of Skus Images to be published

SkuPendingPublishList.description: A list of Skus Pending to be published

skusQuantity.description: The SKUs quantity the listener received from VTEX

status.description:
The status of the Webhook History record.
- `dispatched` is when the Import process could be started successfully
- `error` is when the Import process could not be started. On this cases the field `errorType` is completed with to explain the error origin.

errorType.description:
The error type explains the origin of the error.
- `AccountNotFound` is when the Account could not be matched by the account vtexName
- `AccountIsInactive` is when the Account was matched but is no active
- `AccountSettingIsOff` is when the Account was matched but the setting importPricesSync is not true

VtexCatalogWebhookService.description: The service that sends the message

referenceId.description: The referenceId that is trying to be changed in the entity and cause conflict

ProductWebhookEntity.description: The entity related to the event

referenceId.description: The referenceId that is trying to be changed in the entity and cause conflict

productId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Product that wanted to change its referenceId

conflictProductId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Product that has the referenceId

SkuWebhookEntity.description: The entity related to the event

referenceId.description: The referenceId that is trying to be changed in the entity and cause conflict

skuId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Sku that wanted to change its referenceId

conflictSkuId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Sku that has the referenceId

ean.description: The ean that is trying to be changed in the entity and cause conflict

skuId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Sku that wanted to change its ean

conflictSkuId.description: The vtex-catalog internal ID from the Sku that has the ean

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of items updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

itemsUpdated.description:
The items that were updated correctly.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the updated item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the updated item.

itemsNotModified.description:
The items that were not modified.
This occurs when the item in the service **is equal** to the received item.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the non modified item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the non modified item.

itemsError.description:
Items with some error.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the validation message error.

post.description: The product cannot be Imported because some field are duplicated
The sku cannot be Imported because some field are duplicated
